title: Dark Roasted Spanish Chicken Paella
description: A hearty and flavorful Spanish dish featuring roasted chicken, pomegranate molasses, and a touch of sweetness, perfect for a sick day or a cozy night in.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, pomegranate molasses, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and add the chicken, cooking until browned on all sides.
Add the garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the Arborio rice to the skillet, stirring to coat with the oil and mix with the chicken and garlic.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast for 25 minutes, until the chicken is cooked through and the rice is tender.
Remove the skillet from the oven and flambe with a small amount of brandy, if desired.
Serve the paella hot, garnished with fresh herbs and a squeeze of lemon juice.
